text.title: decomposition-django Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for decomposition-django as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: services/ imports views/ or serializers/ for any reason.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Services are domain logic. Importing HTTP or serialization concerns couples the domain to delivery mechanism, making services impossible to test without an HTTP server.

failure-mode.description: Agent copies a function from views.py into services/ and leaves the original in views.py.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both copies compile. The view calls the old location; the new service is never actually used. Run grep for the old function name after the move and delete the source.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes a utils.py or helpers.py per app as a first refactor step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: utils.py is the next thing to decompose — it becomes a dumping ground for everything that doesn't fit the pattern. Ban it early in CLAUDE.md and redirect to services/ or selectors/.

failure-mode.description: Agent applies @transaction.atomic to every service function as a default.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wrapping a single-write operation in a transaction is a no-op that wastes a DB connection slot and misleads readers into thinking the function coordinates multiple writes.

failure-mode.description: Serializer create() or update() methods calling services directly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This couples serializers to business logic, bypassing the view layer entirely. The view is responsible for calling the service with validated data; serializers only validate and transform.
